seoTitle: Soldiers Hill vs Somerset Dam — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Soldiers Hill and Somerset Dam. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Soldiers Hill vs Somerset Dam: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Soldiers Hill and Somerset Dam.
heading: Soldiers Hill vs Somerset Dam — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Soldiers Hill, Queensland and Somerset Dam, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Soldiers Hill has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Somerset Dam (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Soldiers Hill or Somerset Dam safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Soldiers Hill has a flood risk score of 50/100, while Somerset Dam scores 49/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Soldiers Hill scores 43/100 for bushfire risk. Somerset Dam scores 35/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Soldiers Hill or Somerset Dam?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Soldiers Hill has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.82% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
